title: botrychium ramosum
intro: Botrychium ramosum, also known as the branching rattlesnake fern or branching lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Botrychium. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Botrychium ramosum include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. Herbal preparations of Botrychium ramosum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
